snippet:
fn new_treap_lock<T: MtKey>(val: Option<Box<NodeInner<T>>>) -> (lock: RwLock<Option<Box<NodeInner<T>>>, BSTParaTreapMtEphInv>)
        requires BSTParaTreapMtEphInv.inv(val),

fn new() -> (tree: Self)
            ensures tree@.finite(), tree@.len() == 0;

fn expose(&self) -> (exposed: Exposed<T>)
            ensures true;

fn expose_with_priority(&self) -> (parts: Option<(ParamTreap<T>, T, i64, ParamTreap<T>)>)
            ensures true;

fn join_mid(exposed: Exposed<T>) -> (tree: Self)
            ensures tree@.finite();

fn size(&self) -> (count: usize)
            ensures self@.finite(), count == self@.len();

fn is_empty(&self) -> (empty: bool)
            ensures self@.finite(), empty == (self@.len() == 0);

fn insert(&self, key: T)
            ensures true;

fn delete(&self, key: &T)
            ensures true;

fn find(&self, key: &T) -> (found: Option<T>)
            ensures found matches Some(v) ==> self@.contains(v@);

fn join_pair(&self, other: Self) -> (joined: Self)
            ensures joined@.finite();

fn union(&self, other: &Self) -> (combined: Self)
            ensures combined@.finite(), combined@ == self@.union(other@);

fn intersect(&self, other: &Self) -> (common: Self)
            ensures common@.finite(), common@ == self@.intersect(other@);

fn difference(&self, other: &Self) -> (diff: Self)
            ensures diff@.finite(), diff@ == self@.difference(other@);

fn filter<F: Pred<T>>(&self, predicate: F) -> (filtered: Self)
            ensures filtered@.finite();

fn in_order(&self) -> (ordered: ArraySeqStPerS<T>)
            ensures self@.finite(), ordered.spec_len() == self@.len();

fn empty() -> (set: Self)
            ensures set@.finite(), set@.len() == 0;

fn singleton(value: T) -> (set: Self)
            ensures set@.finite(), set@.len() == 1, set@.contains(value@);

fn size(&self) -> (count: usize)
            ensures self@.finite(), count == self@.len();

fn is_empty(&self) -> (empty: bool)
            ensures self@.finite(), empty == (self@.len() == 0);

fn find(&self, value: &T) -> (found: Option<T>)
            ensures found matches Some(v) ==> self@.contains(v@);

fn contains(&self, value: &T) -> (found: bool)
            ensures found == self@.contains(value@);

fn insert(&mut self, value: T)
            ensures self@.finite(), self@ =~= old(self)@.insert(value@);

fn delete(&mut self, target: &T)
            ensures self@.finite(), self@ =~= old(self)@.remove(target@);

fn union(&self, other: &Self) -> (combined: Self)
            ensures combined@.finite(), combined@ == self@.union(other@);

fn intersection(&self, other: &Self) -> (common: Self)
            ensures common@.finite(), common@ == self@.intersect(other@);

fn difference(&self, other: &Self) -> (diff: Self)
            ensures diff@.finite(), diff@ == self@.difference(other@);

fn join_pair(left: Self, right: Self) -> (joined: Self)
            ensures joined@.finite();

fn join_m(left: Self, pivot: T, right: Self) -> (joined: Self)
            ensures joined@.finite();

fn filter<F: Pred<T>>(&self, predicate: F) -> (filtered: Self)
            ensures filtered@.finite();

fn iter_in_order(&self) -> (ordered: ArraySeqStPerS<T>)
            ensures self@.finite(), ordered.spec_len() == self@.len();

fn as_tree(&self) -> (tree: &ParamTreap<T>)
            ensures tree@ == self@;

fn minimum_inner<T: MtKey + 'static>(tree: &ParamTreap<T>) -> (min: Option<T>)
        ensures
            tree@.finite(),
            tree@.len() == 0 ==> min is None,
            min matches Some(v) ==> tree@.contains(v@),

fn maximum_inner<T: MtKey + 'static>(tree: &ParamTreap<T>) -> (max: Option<T>)
        ensures
            tree@.finite(),
            tree@.len() == 0 ==> max is None,
            max matches Some(v) ==> tree@.contains(v@),

proof fn lemma_contains_left<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(node: &Box<Node<T>>, k: T)
        requires spec_contains_link(&node.left, k),
        ensures spec_contains_link(&Some(*node), k),

proof fn lemma_contains_right<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(node: &Box<Node<T>>, k: T)
        requires spec_contains_link(&node.right, k),
        ensures spec_contains_link(&Some(*node), k),

proof fn lemma_contains_root<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(node: &Box<Node<T>>)
        ensures spec_contains_link(&Some(*node), node.key),

proof fn lemma_height_le_size<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(link: &Link<T>)
        requires
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
            spec_size_link(link) < usize::MAX as nat,
        ensures spec_height_link(link) <= spec_size_link(link),
        decreases *link,

proof fn lemma_size_wf_child_bounded<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(link: &Link<T>)
        requires
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
            spec_size_link(link) > 0,
            spec_size_link(link) < usize::MAX as nat,
        ensures
            match link {
                None => true,
                Some(node) => {
                    spec_size_link(&node.left) < usize::MAX as nat
                    && spec_size_link(&node.right) < usize::MAX as nat
                },
            },
        decreases *link,

proof fn lemma_wf_assemble_node<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(node: &Node<T>)
        requires
            node.size as nat == 1 + spec_size_link(&node.left) + spec_size_link(&node.right),
            spec_size_wf_link(&node.left),
            spec_size_wf_link(&node.right),
        ensures spec_size_wf_link(&Some(Box::new(*node))),

fn new() -> (empty_tree: Self)
            ensures empty_tree@.finite(), empty_tree@.len() == 0;

fn insert(&self, value: T, priority: u64)
            ensures true;

fn delete(&self, target: &T)
            ensures true;

fn contains(&self, target: &T) -> (found: bool)
            ensures found == self@.contains(target@);

fn size(&self) -> (count: usize)
            ensures self@.finite(), count == self@.len();

fn is_empty(&self) -> (empty: bool)
            ensures empty == (self@.len() == 0), self@.finite();

fn height(&self) -> (h: usize)
            ensures true;

fn in_order(&self) -> (ordered: ArraySeqStPerS<T>)
            ensures self@.finite(), ordered.spec_len() == self@.len();

fn pre_order(&self) -> (preordered: ArraySeqStPerS<T>)
            ensures self@.finite(), preordered.spec_len() == self@.len();

fn clone_link<T: StTInMtT + Ord + Clone>(link: &Link<T>) -> (c: Link<T>)
        ensures
            spec_size_link(&c) == spec_size_link(link),
            spec_size_wf_link(link) ==> spec_size_wf_link(&c),
        decreases link,

fn new_treap_link_lock<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(val: Link<T>) -> (lock: RwLock<Link<T>, BSTTreapMtEphInv>)
        requires spec_size_wf_link(&val), spec_size_link(&val) < usize::MAX as nat,

fn size_link<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(link: &Link<T>) -> (sz: usize)
        ensures sz as nat == spec_size_link(link),

fn update<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(node: &mut Node<T>)
        requires 1 + spec_size_link(&old(node).left) + spec_size_link(&old(node).right) <= usize::MAX as nat,
        ensures
            node.size as nat == 1 + spec_size_link(&node.left) + spec_size_link(&node.right),
            node.key == old(node).key,
            node.left == old(node).left,
            node.right == old(node).right,

fn rotate_left<T: StTInMtT + Ord + IsLtTransitive>(link: &mut Link<T>)
        requires
            spec_size_wf_link(old(link)),
            spec_size_link(old(link)) <= usize::MAX as nat,
        ensures
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
            spec_size_link(link) == spec_size_link(old(link)),
            forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(link, k) <==> spec_contains_link(old(link), k),
            spec_bst_link(old(link)) ==> spec_bst_link(link),

fn rotate_right<T: StTInMtT + Ord + IsLtTransitive>(link: &mut Link<T>)
        requires
            spec_size_wf_link(old(link)),
            spec_size_link(old(link)) <= usize::MAX as nat,
        ensures
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
            spec_size_link(link) == spec_size_link(old(link)),
            forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(link, k) <==> spec_contains_link(old(link), k),
            spec_bst_link(old(link)) ==> spec_bst_link(link),

fn insert_link<T: StTInMtT + Ord + IsLtTransitive>(link: &mut Link<T>, value: T, priority: u64)
        requires
            spec_size_link(old(link)) + 1 <= usize::MAX as nat,
            spec_size_wf_link(old(link)),
            T::obeys_partial_cmp_spec(),
        ensures
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
            spec_size_link(link) <= spec_size_link(old(link)) + 1,
            spec_size_link(link) >= spec_size_link(old(link)),
            forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(old(link), k) ==> spec_contains_link(link, k),
            forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(link, k) ==> (spec_contains_link(old(link), k) || k == value),
            spec_bst_link(old(link)) ==> spec_bst_link(link),
        decreases old(link),

fn delete_link<T: StTInMtT + Ord + IsLtTransitive>(link: &mut Link<T>, target: &T)
        requires
            spec_size_wf_link(old(link)),
            spec_size_link(old(link)) < usize::MAX as nat,
            T::obeys_partial_cmp_spec(),
        ensures
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
            spec_size_link(link) <= spec_size_link(old(link)),
            forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(link, k) ==> spec_contains_link(old(link), k),
            spec_bst_link(old(link)) ==> spec_bst_link(link),
        decreases spec_size_link(old(link)),

fn height_link<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(link: &Link<T>) -> (h: usize)
        requires
            spec_size_link(link) < usize::MAX as nat,
            spec_size_wf_link(link),
        ensures h as nat == spec_height_link(link),
        decreases *link,

fn in_order_collect<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(link: &Link<T>, out: &mut Vec<T>)
        requires spec_size_wf_link(link),
        ensures out@.len() == old(out)@.len() + spec_size_link(link) as int,
        decreases *link,

fn pre_order_collect<T: StTInMtT + Ord>(link: &Link<T>, out: &mut Vec<T>)
        requires spec_size_wf_link(link),
        ensures out@.len() == old(out)@.len() + spec_size_link(link) as int,
        decreases *link,

fn default() -> (d: Self)
            ensures d@.finite(), d@.len() == 0,

proof fn lemma_height_le_size(link: &Link<T>)
            requires
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(link),
                Self::spec_size_link(link) < usize::MAX as nat,
            ensures Self::spec_height_link(link) <= Self::spec_size_link(link);

proof fn lemma_wf_assemble_node(node: &Box<Node<T>>)
            requires
                node.size as nat == 1 + Self::spec_size_link(&node.left) + Self::spec_size_link(&node.right),
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&node.left),
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&node.right),
            ensures Self::spec_size_wf_link(&Some(*node));

proof fn lemma_contains_root(node: &Box<Node<T>>)
            ensures spec_contains_link(&Some(*node), node.key);

fn new()                       -> (empty_tree: Self)
        where
            Self: Sized,
            ensures
                empty_tree.spec_size() == 0,
                empty_tree.spec_wf(),
                empty_tree.spec_bst();

fn size(&self)                 -> (sz: usize)
            ensures sz as nat == self.spec_size();

fn is_empty(&self)             -> (empty: bool)
            ensures empty == (self.spec_size() == 0);

fn insert(&mut self, value: T, priority: u64)
            requires
                old(self).spec_size() + 1 <= usize::MAX as nat,
                old(self).spec_wf(),
                T::obeys_partial_cmp_spec(),
            ensures
                self.spec_wf(),
                self.spec_size() <= old(self).spec_size() + 1,
                self.spec_size() >= old(self).spec_size(),
                forall|k: T| old(self).spec_contains(k) ==> self.spec_contains(k),
                old(self).spec_bst() ==> self.spec_bst();

fn delete(&mut self, target: &T)
            requires
                old(self).spec_wf(),
                T::obeys_partial_cmp_spec(),
            ensures
                self.spec_wf(),
                self.spec_size() <= old(self).spec_size(),
                forall|k: T| self.spec_contains(k) ==> old(self).spec_contains(k),
                old(self).spec_bst() ==> self.spec_bst();

fn find(&self, target: &T)     -> (found: Option<&T>)
            ensures found.is_some() ==> self.spec_contains(*found.unwrap());

fn contains(&self, target: &T) -> (found: bool)
            ensures found ==> exists|v: T| self.spec_contains(v);

fn in_order(&self)             -> (ordered: ArraySeqStPerS<T>)
            ensures ordered.spec_len() == self.spec_in_order().len();

fn pre_order(&self)            -> (preordered: ArraySeqStPerS<T>)
            ensures preordered.spec_len() == self.spec_pre_order().len();

fn size_link(link: &Link<T>) -> (sz: usize)
            ensures sz as nat == Self::spec_size_link(link);

fn update_size(node: &mut Box<Node<T>>)
            requires 1 + Self::spec_size_link(&old(node).left) + Self::spec_size_link(&old(node).right) <= usize::MAX as nat,
            ensures
                node.size as nat == 1 + Self::spec_size_link(&node.left) + Self::spec_size_link(&node.right),
                node.key == old(node).key,
                node.left == old(node).left,
                node.right == old(node).right;

fn rotate_left(x: Box<Node<T>>) -> (rotated: Box<Node<T>>)
            requires
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&Some(x)),
                Self::spec_size_link(&Some(x)) <= usize::MAX as nat,
            ensures
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&Some(rotated)),
                Self::spec_size_link(&Some(rotated)) == Self::spec_size_link(&Some(x)),
                Self::spec_bst_link(&Some(x)) ==> Self::spec_bst_link(&Some(rotated)),
                forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(&Some(rotated), k) <==> spec_contains_link(&Some(x), k);

fn rotate_right(x: Box<Node<T>>) -> (rotated: Box<Node<T>>)
            requires
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&Some(x)),
                Self::spec_size_link(&Some(x)) <= usize::MAX as nat,
            ensures
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&Some(rotated)),
                Self::spec_size_link(&Some(rotated)) == Self::spec_size_link(&Some(x)),
                Self::spec_bst_link(&Some(x)) ==> Self::spec_bst_link(&Some(rotated)),
                forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(&Some(rotated), k) <==> spec_contains_link(&Some(x), k);

fn insert_link(link: Link<T>, value: T, priority: u64) -> (inserted: Link<T>)
            requires
                Self::spec_size_link(&link) + 1 <= usize::MAX as nat,
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&link),
                T::obeys_partial_cmp_spec(),
            ensures
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&inserted),
                Self::spec_size_link(&inserted) <= Self::spec_size_link(&link) + 1,
                Self::spec_size_link(&inserted) >= Self::spec_size_link(&link),
                forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(&link, k) ==> spec_contains_link(&inserted, k),
                forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(&inserted, k) ==> (spec_contains_link(&link, k) || k == value),
                Self::spec_bst_link(&link) ==> Self::spec_bst_link(&inserted);

fn delete_link(link: Link<T>, target: &T) -> (deleted: Link<T>)
            requires
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&link),
                T::obeys_partial_cmp_spec(),
            ensures
                Self::spec_size_wf_link(&deleted),
                Self::spec_size_link(&deleted) <= Self::spec_size_link(&link),
                forall|k: T| spec_contains_link(&deleted, k) ==> spec_contains_link(&link, k),
                Self::spec_bst_link(&link) ==> Self::spec_bst_link(&deleted);

fn find_link<'a>(link: &'a Link<T>, target: &T) -> (found: Option<&'a T>)
            ensures found.is_some() ==> spec_contains_link(link, *found.unwrap());

fn in_order_vec(link: &Link<T>) -> (ordered: Vec<T>)
            ensures ordered@.len() == Self::spec_in_order_link(link).len();

fn pre_order_vec(link: &Link<T>) -> (ordered: Vec<T>)
            ensures ordered@.len() == Self::spec_pre_order_link(link).len();

fn default() -> (d: Self)
            ensures d.spec_size() == 0, d.spec_wf(), d.spec_bst(),
